notes.stop_loss_pct: Sell entire position if PnL drops below -20% from entry
notes.circuit_breaker_pct: Pause ALL trading if portfolio drops >15% from high-water mark
notes.take_profit_pct: Sell half position if PnL reaches +50% from entry
notes.max_position_pct: No single position can exceed 30% of total portfolio value
notes.max_positions: Maximum 5 open positions at any time (real money only)
notes.high_water_mark: Updated automatically when portfolio reaches new highs (USDC)
notes.target_profit_usdc: Stop opening new positions once portfolio profit >= this amount above session_start_balance
notes.session_start_balance: Balance at session start — used to calculate session profit
